promotions.title: Welcome Bonus
promotions.description: Get a 100% match on your first deposit up to $500. New players only. Wagering requirements apply — 30x bonus amount before withdrawal.

promotions.title: Free Bet Friday
promotions.description: Place a qualifying bet of $10 or more and receive a $5 free bet every Friday. Valid on pre-match singles with odds of 1.50 or greater.

promotions.title: Loyalty Cashback
promotions.description: Earn 10% weekly cashback on net losses, credited every Monday. Maximum cashback of $200 per week. VIP members get 15%.

promotions.title: Champions League Special
promotions.description: Bet on any Champions League match and get enhanced odds. Boosted markets updated weekly. Maximum stake $50 per enhanced selection.

promotions.title: Slots Tournament
promotions.description: Compete in our weekly slots tournament for a share of the $10,000 prize pool. Top 50 players win. Minimum 100 spins to qualify.

promotions.title: Live Dealer Bonus
promotions.description: Get $25 bonus when you play 5 live dealer games in a single day. Bonus must be wagered 20x on live casino games within 7 days.

promotions.title: Refer a Friend
promotions.description: Earn $50 for every friend who signs up and deposits $20 or more. No limit on referrals. Friends also receive a $25 welcome bonus.

promotions.title: Poker Night Freeroll
promotions.description: Join our $5,000 guaranteed freeroll every Thursday at 8 PM EST. No entry fee. Open to all registered players with at least one deposit.

promotions.title: Accumulator Boost
promotions.description: Get up to 70% extra on winning accumulators with 4+ selections. All selections must have odds of 1.20 or greater. Maximum boost payout $50,000.

promotions.title: Birthday Bonus
promotions.description: Celebrate your birthday with a free $20 bonus! Automatically credited on your birthday. Must have made a deposit in the last 30 days.

promotions.title: Early Payout Offer
promotions.description: If your team goes 2 goals ahead, we pay out your bet as a winner — even if the other team comes back. Pre-match singles only.

promotions.title: Roulette Cashback
promotions.description: Get 5% cashback on all roulette bets placed during the weekend. Cashback credited Monday morning. No wagering requirements.

promotions.title: New Game Launch Spins
promotions.description: Get 50 free spins on every new slot release. Spins credited automatically. Winnings capped at $100 and subject to 25x wagering.

promotions.title: VIP Reload Bonus
promotions.description: Exclusive 50% reload bonus up to $250 every week for VIP members. 15x wagering requirement. Available Monday through Wednesday.

promotions.title: Horse Racing Daily Double
promotions.description: Pick winners of two selected races for a chance to win a $1,000 free bet. One entry per day. Selections must be made before the first race.

promotions.title: Baccarat Streak Bonus
promotions.description: Win 5 hands in a row at any baccarat table and receive a $100 bonus. Tracked automatically. Multiple streaks allowed per day.
